title: Voxel Vibes
description: [Alpha] Simple shader with focus on keeping vanilla look
body:
# Voxel vibes [ALPHA]

Simple shader with focus on keeping vanilla look

## Main features
- Pixel aligned shadows
- Improved skybox rendering
- Improved fog
- Basic Distant Horizons support

## Gallery
For more images check out [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/shader/voxel-vibes/gallery)

![Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C1LhPps6/images/47ec0a4a4932c677f86213c9ef328a5f05f3b691.png)

![Parrot pixel shadows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/C1LhPps6/images/960c10c51eb6a27e82df4d843c3eb38513c8c595.png)



Currently this shader is only test and not guaranteed to be supported, everything is subject to chamnge and its further development depends on your feedback. Bugs are expected, report them on issues page. 


Based on [XorDevs Default Shaderpack](https://github.com/XorDev/XorDevs-Default-Shaderpack)
